Marketing.heroBody: Cashly tracks your accounts, budgets, and subscriptions, so your net worth is never a guess.
Marketing.featureAccountsBody: Bring checking, savings, credit cards, and cash into one net worth number, across currencies.
Marketing.featureBudgetsBody: Set a monthly limit per category and see what's left to spend before the month runs out.
Marketing.featureSubscriptionsBody: Track recurring charges and their next billing date, so nothing renews as a surprise.
Marketing.featureInsightsBody: See income, spending, and net worth trends over time without building a spreadsheet.
Marketing.ctaBody: Free to use. Your data stays yours, exportable or deletable any time from Settings.

Login.heroTitle: Every account, card, and loan in one calm view.
Login.heroBody: Track balances, budgets, and subscriptions across currencies, and never miss a payment date again.
Login.heroFootnote: Private by design. Your data, your eyes only.
Login.welcomeBody: Sign in to pick up where you left off.
Login.linkError: That sign-in link didn't work. Please try again.
Login.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
Login.passwordRules: At least {min} characters, with upper and lower case, a number, and a symbol.
Login.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

Errors.title: Something went wrong
Errors.body: This screen hit an error. Try again — if it keeps happening, reload the page.

Overview.greetingDescription: Your money at a glance, once your accounts are set up.
Overview.title: Overview
Overview.netWorthEmptyBody: Add your first account and every balance, in any currency, rolls up here in your base currency.
Overview.netWorthBody: Assets minus cards and loans, in {currency}.
Overview.upcomingEmpty: No card due dates, loan installments, or subscription charges scheduled.
Overview.starterAccountsBody: Add bank accounts, credit cards, and loans to see balances and utilization.
Overview.starterBudgetsBody: Set a monthly budget per category and watch what's used and what's left.
Overview.starterSubscriptionsBody: Track recurring charges and their next payment dates in one place.

Accounts.pageDescription: Bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and assets.
Accounts.emptyDescription: Add your first account to start tracking balances, credit-card utilization, and loan payoff.
Accounts.groupAssetsBlurb: Estimated values you keep up to date.

AccountDetail.derivedFromStarting: Derived from a starting balance of {amount}.
AccountDetail.addPrincipalRateTerm: Add a principal, rate, and term to see the amortization schedule.
AccountDetail.anchoredToStatement: As of the {date} statement, plus payments since.
AccountDetail.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the account and its transactions. This can't be undone.
AccountDetail.noActivityDescription: Log an expense, income, or payment for this account to see it here.

AccountForm.descriptionCard: Credit-card balance is reconciled from statements and payments.
AccountForm.descriptionLoan: Loan payoff is tracked from payments into the loan.
AccountForm.descriptionOther: Balance is derived from your transactions.
AccountForm.bankHint: Transfers between accounts at the same bank skip the network fee.
AccountForm.groupHint: Group two currency lines of the same physical card so they render as one.
AccountForm.loanHint: Enter this loan as it stands today, not at origination: principal is what you currently owe, and term is how many installments are still left. Past rate changes or extra payments don't need to be re-entered — they're already reflected in today's balance. If you've already paid some installments before adding this loan, fill in the original term below so the progress bar gives you credit for them — it's display-only and doesn't affect the balance or schedule.
AccountForm.originalTermPlaceholder: Leave blank if this is a brand-new loan
AccountForm.networkFeeOptionalLabel: Network fee is optional (a free, slower option exists)
AccountForm.toastNameGroupOrNone: Name the new card group, or pick “No group”.
AccountForm.toastNameBankOrNone: Name the new bank, or pick “No bank”.

Statements.title: Statements
Statements.description: Upload your monthly statement PDF. It becomes the source of truth: balances anchor to it and purchases import as categorized expenses. Payments you record yourself are never duplicated.
Statements.passwordHint: This statement is password-protected. The password is used once and never stored.
Statements.unreadablePdf: That file couldn't be read as a PDF.
Statements.unsupportedBank: This bank's statement layout isn't supported yet.
Statements.checksumFailed: The statement's own totals don't add up ({detail}). Nothing was imported.
Statements.notACard: Statements can only be imported on credit cards.
Statements.currencyMismatch: Section {section} is in {currency}; pick an account in that currency.
Statements.duplicateMapping: Each section must be imported into a different account.
Statements.noCategories: You need at least one category before importing.
Statements.historyEmpty: No statements yet. Import your first one.
Statements.deleteConfirm: Delete this statement? Its imported transactions are removed and the balance recomputed.
Statements.costOfCarryStat: Carrying this balance costs about {amount}/month at {rate}% APR.

Budgets.pageDescription: A monthly budget per category, with what's used and what's left.
Budgets.emptyDescription: Add a category to start budgeting your monthly spending.
Budgets.noBudgetsToCopy: No budgets to copy from last month.

Transactions.pageDescription: Every expense, income, and payment in one ledger.
Transactions.emptyDescriptionNone: Use Quick-Add (the + button or ⌘K) to log your first expense, income, or payment.
Transactions.emptyDescriptionFiltered: Try clearing a filter or search term.

TransactionForm.rateInvalid: Enter an exchange rate greater than zero
TransactionForm.transferRateInvalid: Enter a conversion rate for this transfer
TransactionForm.noAccountsHint: Add an account first — transactions need somewhere to land.
TransactionForm.fromStatementHint: Imported from a statement — only the category and notes can change.

Subscriptions.pageDescription: Recurring charges, their next dates, and your monthly total.
Subscriptions.emptyDescription: Add recurring charges to track their cost and next payment dates.
Subscriptions.needsAccount: Set an account on this subscription first.

Insights.pageDescription: Where your money goes: distribution, budget pace, and cash flow.
Insights.costOfCarryEmpty: Import a card statement to see what carrying your balances would cost.

Settings.pageDescription: Your base currency, categories, and theme.
Settings.baseCurrencyDescription: Dashboards and net worth convert into this currency.
Settings.soundEffectsDescription: Light sounds for saves, deletes, and errors.
Settings.categoriesDescription: Add or remove categories from the Budgets screen.
Settings.sessionDescription: Sign out of Cashly on this device.
Settings.displayNameDescription: How Cashly greets you and labels your account.
Settings.signedInAsDescription: The email tied to this account.
Settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently erase your account and all its data — accounts, transactions, budgets, subscriptions.
Settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes your account and every account, transaction, budget, and subscription in it. This can't be undone.

Pwa.title: Install app
Pwa.description: Add Cashly to your home screen for quick, full-screen access.
Pwa.iosInstructions: On iOS: tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".

Common.errorGeneric: That didn't work. Please try again.
Common.errorReference: That refers to something that no longer exists.
Common.statementRowLocked: This transaction comes from an imported statement. Delete the statement to remove it.

Welcome.nameBody: Used to greet you on the overview and to label your account.
Welcome.currencyBody: Net worth and every dashboard total convert into this currency.
Welcome.currencyHint: Accounts can each hold their own currency. This is the one everything rolls up into.
Welcome.accountBody: One account is enough to start. You can add cards, loans, and property later.
Welcome.errorNoAccount: Add an account before finishing setup.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using Cashly, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.
Terms.s2Body: Cashly is a personal finance tracker that lets you record accounts, transactions, budgets, and subscriptions across currencies. It is a bookkeeping tool, not a bank, broker, or financial advisor, and it doesn't move money on your behalf.
Terms.s3Body: You're responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter and for keeping your login credentials secure. You must be able to form a binding contract to use Cashly, and one account is for one person — don't share credentials.
Terms.s4Body: Don't use Cashly to store data you don't have the right to store, attempt to disrupt the service, or try to access another user's data. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate this.
Terms.s5Body: Balances, budgets, and insights shown in Cashly are calculated from the data you enter. They're provided for informational purposes only and are not financial, tax, or legal advice.
Terms.s6Body: How we collect, use, and store your data is described in the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>. You can export or permanently delete your account and its data at any time from Settings.
Terms.s7Body: Cashly is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We don't guarantee the service will be uninterrupted or error-free, and to the fullest extent permitted by law we're not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of it.
Terms.s8Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of Cashly after a change means you accept the updated terms.
Terms.s9Body: Questions about these terms? Reach us at <link>{email}</link>.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Body1: Account info: your email address, and, if you sign in with Google, your name and profile picture from your Google account.
Privacy.s1Body2: Financial data you enter: accounts, balances, transactions, budgets, and subscriptions. This data is entered by you and is not pulled from any bank or financial institution.
Privacy.s2Body: To run the app: authenticate you, show your data back to you, and calculate the balances, budgets, and insights the app displays. We don't sell your data or use it for advertising.
Privacy.s3Body: Cashly is built on Supabase, which hosts our database and handles authentication. If you sign in with Google, Google processes your sign-in under its own privacy policy. We don't share your financial data with any other third party.
Privacy.s4Body: Your data is stored in a database scoped to your account, protected by row-level security so only you can read or write it. Connections to Cashly are encrypted in transit.
Privacy.s5Body: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time from Settings → Danger zone. Deletion is immediate and cannot be undone.
Privacy.s6Body: You can access, correct, or delete your data directly in the app at any time. If you'd like help exporting or removing your data, contact us using the details below.
Privacy.s7Body: We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of Cashly after a change means you accept the updated policy.
Privacy.s8Body: Questions about this policy? Reach us at <link>{email}</link>.
